title: Essential Auto Sprint (EAS)
description: A lightweight utility that automates sprinting during forward motion to minimize manual input and ensure a seamless movement experience.
body: # Essential Auto Sprint (EAS) **Essential Auto Sprint (EAS)** is a professional-grade utility designed to optimize movement mechanics for competitive environments. By automating the sprinting process during forward motion, EAS provides a critical advantage in **PvP encounters and high-stakes server gameplay**, ensuring fluid transitions between offensive maneuvers and tactical retreats. --- ### Clean In-Game Configuration Menu > 💡 **Pro Tip:** For the best experience, it is **highly recommended** to install **ModMenu**. This allows you to access the EAS configuration screen directly from your ESC menu to toggle the mod and customize your shortcut keys with ease. --- ### ⚔️ Competitive Optimization * **Combat Efficiency:** Facilitates consistent sprinting during engagements, allowing for more aggressive pursuit and reliable escapes. * **Operational Fluidity:** Eliminates the mechanical friction of manual input, ensuring the player maintains maximum momentum at all times. * **Strategic Focus:** Reduces repetitive keyboard tasks, enabling total concentration on combat precision and environmental awareness. --- ### 🛠 Technical Specifications & Compatibility * **Framework:** Exclusively developed for the **Fabric** mod loader. * **Lightweight Design:** Built using optimized Mixins to ensure zero impact on your game's performance or FPS. * **Version Versatility:** Engineered to support modern Minecraft versions on Fabric, with a commitment to stability and future updates. --- ### 📜 Licensing & Redistribution This project is governed by a **Custom License** structured to balance community utility with developer recognition: * **Modpack Integration:** Authorized for inclusion in any modpack or public project. * **Developmental Forks:** Modification and the creation of derivative works (Forks) are permitted. * **Mandatory Attribution:** Any redistribution or modification **strictly requires** clear credit to the original project and the developer (**GBX Team / DevGBX9**) within both the metadata and the public-facing documentation. --- ### 👤 Development Maintained and authored by **GBX Team** (**DevGBX9** on GitHub).
